subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen hath made mention, time and again, of him that is elevated. Blessed is he who hath hearkened, turned, and attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی متتابعا مترادفا علی مرفوع را ذکر نموده طوبی له بما سمع و اقبل و بلغ
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
